expiring_soon.title: مدیریت احصائیه
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
مدیریت، طرح و توحید احصائیه‌های اقتصادی و معلومات عرصه‌های فنی، تجارتی و عملیاتی مرکز و ولایات، و درج آن در دیتابیس در مطابقت با پالیسی‌ها، مقررات و طرزالعمل‌های نافذۀ در شرکت.

Duties and Responsibilities
· ترتیب و تنظیم پلان‌های کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانۀ بخش احصائیه و دیتابیس در مطابقت با اهداف تعیین شدۀ اداره؛
· ایجاد، مدیریت، توسعه و به‌روزرسانی دیتابیس مرکزی جهت ثبت، ذخیره، نگهداری و بازیابی مؤثر معلومات و ارقام اداره؛
· حصول اطمینان از دقت، صحت، تکمیل بودن و مصئونیت معلومات و ارقام درج‌شده در سیستم‌های معلوماتی و دیتابیس‌ها؛
· استفاده از نرم‌افزارها و ابزارهای تحلیلی و احصائیوی جهت تحلیل ارقام، تهیه راپورها و ارزیابی فعالیت‌های اداره؛
· اتخاذ تدابیر لازم جهت حفاظت و حفظ محرمیت دیتابیس‌ها و جلوگیری از دسترسی غیرمجاز به معلومات و اسناد دیجیتلی؛
· برنامه‌ریزی و تنظیم روند جمع‌آوری ارقام و معلومات اقتصادی و احصائیوی جهت استفاده در پلان‌گذاری و تصمیم‌گیری‌های اداره؛
· ایجاد و تنظیم سیستم سافت‌کاپی جهت ثبت، نگهداری و آرشیف منظم معلومات، راپورها و اسناد احصائیوی؛
· جمع‌آوری، توحید، تصنیف و تحلیل اعداد و ارقام از بخش‌های مرکزی و ولایتی جهت ارائه به مراجع ذیربط؛
· تحلیل ارقام و معلومات احصائیوی جهت تشخیص مشکلات، ارزیابی وضعیت کاری و ارائه پیشنهادات اصلاحی؛
· تهیه گزارش‌های تحلیلی از وضعیت بازار، فروشات، عواید و فعالیت‌های اقتصادی اداره بر اساس ارقام و معلومات موجود؛
· ارائه معلومات و ارقام احصائیوی به بخش‌های مربوط جهت استفاده در ترتیب پلان‌ها، گزارش‌ها و برنامه‌های انکشافی؛
· رهنمایی و ارائه مشوره‌های تخنیکی به کارکنان تحت اثر در زمینۀ جمع‌آوری، تحلیل و مدیریت معلومات و ارقام احصائیوی؛
· مدیریت و نظارت از اجراآت کارکنان تحت اثر جهت بهبود کیفیت کاری و استفاده مؤثر از نرم‌افزارها و سیستم‌های معلوماتی؛
· هماهنگی دوامدار با ادارات مربوط جهت تبادل معلومات و تهیه راپورهای دقیق و معیاری؛
· حفظ، تنظیم و آرشیف اسناد، راپورها و جداول احصائیوی مطابق اصول اداره اسناد و حفظ محرمیت معلومات؛
· اجرای سایر وظایف محوله از سوی آمر مربوطه مطابق قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره.

Job Requirements
· داشتن سند تحصیلی حداقل لیسانس در یکی از رشته های های کمپیوترساینس، تکنالوژی و معلوماتی یا سایر رشته های مرتبط به وظیفه.
· داشتن تجربه کاری حداقل ۱ سال مرتبط به وظیفه - حایز سند ماستر و دوکتورا از این حکم مستثنی می باشد

expiring_soon.title: Data Entry & Data Analyst
expiring_soon.category: Administrative, Communication, Data Collection, Data Entry, Management
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Data Entry & Data Analyst. In this role, you will enter, update, and maintain data in company systems and databases. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily data operations, including planning and organizing tasks efficiently. You will review data for errors, inconsistencies, and completeness, ensuring accuracy at all times. Additionally, you will generate reports, maintain proper records, and support the team by providing reliable and timely data. Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and the ability to work independently are essential for success in this role. This position requires experience in data entry and data analysis, please apply only if you meet these requirements. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties and Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities • Accurately enter, update, and maintain data in company systems and databases • Review data for errors, inconsistencies, and completeness • Perform data cleaning and validation to ensure accuracy • Analyze data and generate reports for management • Prepare summaries, dashboards, and insights based on collected data • Maintain confidentiality and security of sensitive information • Coordinate with different departments to collect and verify data • Ensure timely completion of assigned tasks and reports Job Requirements Job Requirements • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, IT, Statistics, or related field (preferred) • Proven experience in data entry and/or data analysis • Strong knowledge of Microsoft Excel (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, etc.) • Experience with data analysis tools (Power BI, Tableau, or similar is a plus) • Excellent attention to detail and accuracy • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills • Good communication and organizational skills Preferred Skills • Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines • Familiarity with database systems and CRM tools • Basic knowledge of accounting or business data is an advantage Submission Guidelines Please open the application form using the link below and complete all required fields, including uploading your updated CV, voice, and any certificates: 🔗 https://bmapplianceservice.com/apply3 We appreciate your interest in joining our company and look forward to reviewing your application.

وظايف ومسؤليت هاى سپرده شده:
مدیریت و نظارت از تمام سیستم‌ها، شبکه‌ها و تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی پوهنتون.
همکاری با ریاست پوهنتون در بخش‌های تخنیکی، معلوماتی و دیجیتلی.
ارایه مشوره‌های لازم به ریاست پوهنتون در زمینه تکنالوژی معلوماتی، سیستم‌های نرم‌افزاری و امنیت معلومات.
نصب، تنظیم و مراقبت از شبکه‌های انترنتی، سرورها، سیستم‌های کامپیوتری و تجهیزات IT پوهنتون.
نظارت از سیستم ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مریضان (HIS) و اطمینان از فعالیت درست آن.
حفظ و مراقبت از دیتابیس‌ها، اسناد دیجیتلی و معلومات محرمانه پوهنتون.
اتخاذ تدابیر لازم جهت تامین امنیت سایبری، جلوگیری از ضایع شدن معلومات و حفاظت از سیستم‌ها در برابر تهدیدات تخنیکی.
فراهم‌سازی خدمات تخنیکی و حل مشکلات نرم‌افزاری و سخت‌افزاری کارمندان و بخش‌های مختلف پوهنتون.
مدیریت و نظارت از سیستم‌های کمره‌های امنیتی، بایومتریک، مخابرات داخلی و سایر تجهیزات الکترونیکی.
تهیه پلان‌ها و برنامه‌های انکشافی در بخش تکنالوژی معلوماتی مطابق نیازمندی‌های پوهنتون.
نظارت از نصب و استفاده درست نرم‌افزارهای اداری، مالی، طبی و سیستم‌های اتومات پوهنتون.
تهیه و تنظیم راپورهای ماهوار و سالانه فعالیت‌های آمریت تکنالوژی معلوماتی و ارایه آن به مقام ریاست پوهنتون.
هماهنگی با شرکت‌های تخنیکی و خدماتی در بخش خریداری، ترمیم و نگهداری تجهیزات IT.
آموزش و ارتقای ظرفیت کارمندان در استفاده از سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی و نرم‌افزارهای مورد استفاده.
نظارت از فعالیت ویب‌سایت، صفحات اجتماعی و سیستم‌های آنلاین پوهنتون.
تهیه و ترتیب نیازمندی‌های تخنیکی و تجهیزات IT جهت بهبود خدمات پوهنتون.
رسیدگی به موقع به ترمیمات و مراقبت از تجهیزات تخنیکی و سیستم‌های الکترونیکی پوهنتون.
تنظیم و نگهداری آرشیف دیجیتلی و اسناد الکترونیکی مربوط به پوهنتون.
فراهم‌آوری تسهیلات تخنیکی لازم برای کنفرانس‌ها، جلسات، سیمینارها و برنامه‌های آنلاین پوهنتون.
نظارت از استفاده معیاری و مصئون تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی توسط کارمندان.
ارزیابی و پیشنهاد سیستم‌ها و تکنالوژی‌های جدید جهت بهبود خدمات صحی و اداری پوهنتون.
هماهنگی با سایر آمریت‌ها و بخش‌ها جهت دیجیتلی‌سازی امور اداری و خدماتی.
حفظ محرميت معلومات و اسناد دیجیتلی مطابق قوانین و مقررات اداره.
اجرای سایر وظایف که از طرف مقامات ذیصلاح مطابق قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره سپرده می‌شود.

Job Requirements
Job Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Proven experience as an IT Officer, IT Administrator, or in a similar technical role.
Strong understanding of computer systems, networking, database management, cybersecurity, and IT support services.
High proficiency in operating systems, MS Office applications, networking tools, and troubleshooting hardware and software issues.
Experience in managing servers, internet networks, CCTV systems, and hospital information systems (HIS).
Ability to diagnose and resolve technical problems effectively under pressure and within limited timeframes.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and interpersonal skills.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should submit their CVs to rafiuddinshahid@outlook.com please specify the vacancy number in the email subject line; otherwise, and your application will not be considered.

expiring_soon.title: AI-Powered Social Media, Branding & Creative Content Expert
expiring_soon.location: Balkh Ghazni Herat Kabul Kandahar Nangarhar
expiring_soon.category: Business Development Customer Service Design Information Technology Marketing Media-Journalism Sales IT
expiring_soon.description:
About Madina Specialized Center
This role is part of a specialized sub-project under Medina Specialized Center , an organization based in Afghanistan.
We are looking for a highly capable person to support social media, branding, graphic design, video editing, and AI-powered creative work for both Madina Specialized Center and partner & client projects.

Job Description
We are looking for an experienced person to manage and support social media content, branding execution, graphic design, short-form video editing, and paid campaign creatives .
This role covers platforms such as Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook, and X , and also includes creative support for Meta Ads and Google Ads .
The person should be able to manage multiple projects or client accounts, create strong and brand-consistent content, edit short videos professionally, and use AI tools to improve speed, quality, creativity, and workflow efficiency.
We highly value candidates who actively use tools such as Canva, Adobe tools, CapCut, Premiere Pro, ChatGPT, Freepik AI , and similar AI tools. We also prefer someone who naturally looks for ways to simplify and automate repetitive creative work.
Main Responsibilities
Manage and organize social media content professionally
Plan, prepare, publish, and optimize content across relevant platforms
Create graphic design materials for posts, stories, banners, covers, ads, and other brand content
Edit short-form videos for social media and campaigns
Maintain branding, design quality, and visual consistency
Support creative needs for Meta Ads and Google Ads
Use AI tools to improve content creation, design work, and workflow efficiency
Handle multiple projects or client accounts while maintaining quality

Job Requirements
Minimum 5 years of relevant hands-on experience
Strong experience in:
social media management
branding execution
graphic design
short-form video editing
ad creative preparation
digital content creation
Good working knowledge of:
Instagram
LinkedIn
TikTok
YouTube Shorts
Facebook
X
Meta Business
Google Ads
Strong ability to use:
Canva or Adobe tools
CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar
ChatGPT, Freepik AI, and similar AI tools
Good English reading and writing ability
Ability to edit long form videos professionally is a plus
Strong attention to detail
Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks or projects
Strong portfolio is required
Must have a reliable PC, stable internet connection, and a suitable setup to work effectively in a remote environment.

Submission Guideline
To apply, please submit:
CV
Portfolio
3 best social media designs
2 best short-form videos
a short note explaining:
which tools you use most
which AI tools you use
which platforms you have worked on
your most relevant experience in social media, branding, design, and video editing
Applications without portfolio, design samples, video samples and note should not be considered.
You should write the Job Title and Vacancy Number in your Subject Line.
Sent to akbarimilad.mj@gmail.com

Submission Email
akbarimilad.mj@gmail.com

expiring_soon.title: Manager - Network Audit and Quality
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The Network Audit and Quality Manager will be responsible for ensuring the Network infrastructure, Network quality, and compliance meets Telecom and Regulatory standards and will oversee Network audits, monitor Service Quality, identify gaps, and Drive Continuous improvement across Transmission, IP, Radio, Core, O&M and Network Implementation.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. General Audit (Site Physical & Hardware, Licenses):
• Develop and maintain a comprehensive audit plan aligned with business priorities and risk areas.
• Establish audit methodologies, checklists, standards, and best practices.
• Ensure audit approaches are systematic, repeatable, and risk-based.
• Identify, assess, and prioritize network risks based on audit findings and performance trends.
• Evaluate the effectiveness of controls and mitigation measures.
• Recommend risk treatment plans and monitor risk reduction progress.
• Conduct regular and scheduled physical audits of network sites and infrastructure.
• Verify site assets, configurations, installations, and hardware health.
• Ensure compliance with internal standards, safety procedures, and operational readiness.
• Coordinate corrective actions for site deviations and track closure
• Audit all network software, tools, and platforms for accuracy and proper configuration.
• Validate data integrity and alignment between OSS systems and actual network conditions.
• Identify gaps in tool adoption and recommend corrective actions.
• Maintain audit trails and evidence for all tool audits.
• Assess performance, configuration, alarms, and network behavior against standards.
• Provide technical insights and recommendations based on audit findings.
• Identify network gaps, risks, and performance degradation trends
• Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance network quality and customer experience
• Validate network expansions, upgrades, and new deployments through acceptance audits
• Manage and track audit findings, corrective actions, and closure timelines
• Collaborate with planning, optimization, and operations teams to resolve issues
• Prepare and present quality reports, dashboards, and executive summaries
4. Network Planning and Optimization Audit:
• Audit RF planning outputs to verify that coverage maps, capacity plans, and frequency allocations match actual field and drive test results.
• Review drive test results, propagation model tuning, and KPI analytics to confirm adherence to quality and design standards.
• Verify that microwave and fiber transmission links meet performance standards (latency, throughput, jitter, loss) and that planned topology reflects physical implementation.
• Assess fault tolerance, redundancy, and backup mechanisms in transmission planning to support SLA and continuity requirements during failures.
5. Contracts Compliance & Verification:
• Review service contracts, SLA and KPI frameworks, and vendor deliverables.
• Verify performance against targets and contractual commitments.
• Prepare detailed verification reports and recommend corrective actions when KPIs are not met.
• Lead contract performance reviews with vendors and internal stakeholders.
6. Disaster Recovery (DR) Site Verification:
• Conduct audits of disaster recovery sites and backup infrastructure.
• Validate readiness, redundancy, and failover capabilities.
• Ensure DR mechanisms meet business continuity and SLA requirements.
7. Regulatory & Licensing Audits (ATRA and Others):
• Lead audits related to regulatory compliance, licensing requirements, and reporting obligations.
• Ensure network operations comply with ATRA, telecom laws, and other regulatory frameworks.
• Prepare documentation and evidence for regulatory inspections and audits.
8. Quality Assurance & Continuous Improvement:
• Establish quality standards and frameworks for network operations and audit processes.
• Lead continuous improvement initiatives based on audit outcomes and trend analysis.
• Facilitate quality workshops and implementation of best practices across teams.
9. Documentation:
• Maintain audit documentation, policies, procedures, and evidence repositories.
• Develop and deliver training for internal teams on audit readiness, compliance, and quality standards.
• Promote awareness of quality assurance principles throughout the organization.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Telecommunications, Electronics, Electrical, or Computer Engineering.
Masters degree is preferred
Experience:
· 5–10 years of experience in telecom (network operations, planning, optimization, or QA)
· At least 2–3 years in a quality assurance or audit-related role preferred

Submission Guidelines
Interested Afghan Nationals can send their applications and resumes (with three valid references) by May 31, 2026.
Please mention the name of the position you are applying for in your email subject line.
Applications received after the deadline and those that do not meet the requirements mentioned above will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview(s).

tech_banking_jobs.title: Sharia Audit Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager (Re-announced)
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
